b.label: PoleOrder(R[g_DBP]) at role boundaries
b.standard_term: pole order of scalar curvature of the DBP metric family at role-singular boundaries

evidence.label: Expected deliverable: Theorem (Role-Singularity Valuation La
evidence.summary: Let F(D,S,P)=0 be a regular 3-role constraint surface away from the role boundary, with channel-inverse metric g_DBP=-h^{-1}. Let γ(t) cross a simple role boundary at t=0 where one output derivative vanishes to order 1.
